overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a dusk exploration of Night City. The camera walks through a landscaped urban plaza, passes through a security checkpoint, and transitions to driving along a multi-lane avenue with futuristic architecture and neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: landscaped urban plaza with benches and ground lighting

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the plaza toward the security checkpoint ahead

entered.detail: modern concrete benches with integrated ground lighting underneath
rectangular illuminated pillars casting warm light on the wet pavement
tall leafy trees lining the plaza walkway
tall futuristic tower with multiple illuminated sections and antenna spires
large dark metal gateway with overhead cover and vertical supports

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a landscaped urban plaza at dusk, with wet concrete pavement reflecting the warm glow of ground lanterns. The camera moves forward past benches and mature trees toward a large security gate structure in the distance, with a towering illuminated skyscraper visible against the darkening sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered security checkpoint with barrier gates

events.description: entering the covered security checkpoint structure from the open plaza
ambient light shifts to artificial cyan neon strips overhead as the camera moves deeper into the structure

agents.ego_description: passing through the security checkpoint between concrete barriers and under the covered roof

entered.detail: massive dark metal overhead structure with linear cyan lighting strips
retractable bollards and yellow-black striped barrier arms blocking the road
long linear cyan LED strips running along the ceiling of the gate

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a covered security checkpoint structure, transitioning from the open plaza to a sheltered corridor with artificial cyan lighting. The space is enclosed by dark metal walls and concrete barriers, with the illuminated city skyline visible through the far end of the gate.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban roundabout with circular commercial building and palm trees

events.description: exiting the covered checkpoint into the open street with a circular intersection
turning right to navigate around the roundabout and enter the main avenue

agents.ego_description: navigating the roundabout curve and merging onto the main street while observing the surroundings

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians walking along the sidewalk near the circular building

entered.detail: rounded modern building with extensive glass facade and rooftop signage
large illuminated corporate sign reading DYNALAR on a building facade
tall palm tree standing in the center of the roundabout island
modern horizontal light poles with cyan illuminated bases

segments.scene_description: Exiting the checkpoint, the scene opens into a wide urban roundabout featuring a distinctive circular glass building with neon signage. The camera turns right around the central palm tree island, passing pedestrians on the sidewalk and approaching the main avenue with the DYNALAR corporate building visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane downtown avenue with tall residential towers

events.description: accelerating from walking to driving speed while entering the multi-lane road
following a red sedan through a marked crosswalk intersection

agents.ego_description: driving down the multi-lane avenue following traffic flow through the city center

notable_agents.action: red sedan driving ahead in the same lane with brake lights illuminated

entered.detail: wide asphalt avenue with double yellow lines and multiple traffic lanes
tall brown concrete residential tower with repetitive balcony patterns
large illuminated advertising screens on building rooftops displaying colorful graphics

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions to driving speed along a multi-lane downtown avenue, following a red sedan through intersections. A massive brutalist residential tower dominates the right side of the street while neon billboards and illuminated skyscrapers line the horizon. The road stretches ahead with modern street lights and moderate traffic moving through the futuristic cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a quiet, landscaped urban plaza into the high-speed flow of a neon-lit downtown avenue. It begins by gliding across wet concrete pavement reflecting warm ground lanterns, moving past benches and trees toward a distant security gate under a darkening sky. As the camera enters the checkpoint, the open air gives way to a sheltered corridor of dark metal and artificial cyan lighting before emerging once more into a wide urban roundabout. The scene then expands past a circular glass building and a central palm tree island, turning right toward the main avenue and the DYNALAR corporate building. Finally, the perspective shifts to driving speed, following a red sedan past a massive brutalist residential tower and glowing billboards that line the horizon of the futuristic cityscape.
